LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, PLAINTIFF SANDRA KEBEDE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE COLIN AU, D.D.S. AS A DOE DEFENDANT IS GRANTED UNDER CCP 474. PLAINTIFF DEMONSTRATES THAT SHE WAS IGNORANT OF DR. AU'S RELATIONSHIP TO HER INJURIES WHEN SHE FILED SUIT. CCP 474 IS LIBERALLY CONSTRUED AND THERE IS MINIMAL PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS BECAUSE THE TRIAL IS SET FOR JANUARY 13, 2014. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KRISTEN ROSS OF BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, TEL. NO. 835-6777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MELISSA MEYERS OF BRADLEY CURLEY, TEL. NO. 464-8888 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT FRANCIS CHUNG, FRANCIS H. CHUNG, D.D.S., INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition Notice shall take place on June 5, 2013. The court did not award sanctions. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Leave To Amend The Complaint To Sub As A Doe Deft
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kristen Ross, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, Tel. 415.835.6777, for plaintiff and moving party;
Dane T. Jones, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, Tel. 415.438.5961, appearing specially for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF SANDRA KEBEDE's Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint To Substitute Colin Au, D.D.S. As A Doe Defendant is granted under CCP 474. Plaintiff demonstrates that she was ignorant of Dr. Au's relationship to her injuries when she filed suit. CCP 474 is liberally construed and there is minimal prejudice to defendants because the trial is set for January 13, 2014. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
